notes: Security remediation for C021/C022/C012 path-traversal vulnerabilities. Added separate pathSafety.ts with containedPath helper. Three call sites patched: ladder.ts target_file (C021), ladder.ts snapshot bak path (C022), requestHint.ts rung content path (C012). Schema-level defense-in-depth added to validatePhases: slug regex /^[a-z0-9][a-z0-9_-]*$/ for phase.id and spot.id; isValidRelPath for target_file and rungs paths. warnings.ts AutoWriteFailedWarning.kind_detail extended with path-traversal. All existing test IDs (p1-spot-1, p2-spot-1, p1-bootstrap, p2-polling, p1, p2, s1, s2, src/App.tsx) pass both slug and relpath checks.
